description_long: This is a large, dual-chamber barbecue grill with a robust black and stainless steel construction, featuring two separate lidded cooking compartments each with a handle and temperature gauge. The front panel includes multiple control knobs, likely for gas burners, and a central ignition button, as well as a storage cabinet with double doors below. The grill is equipped with two side shelves, one of which has a perforated section, providing ample workspace for food preparation or utensil placement. The unit stands on a sturdy base with two large wheels on one side and two fixed legs on the other, allowing for easy repositioning. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for outdoor gatherings in urban parks, patios, or backyards. The metallic surfaces are smooth and slightly reflective, while the black panels have a matte finish.
description: A large, dual-lid barbecue grill with stainless steel and black panels, featuring side shelves, control knobs, and a lower storage cabinet. It stands on two wheels and two fixed legs for mobility and stability.
description_view_0: Front view showing dual lids with handles, control knobs, ignition button, and double-door storage cabinet below.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved lids, side shelf, and the depth of the grill body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat backs of the lids, both side shelves, and the open lower shelf.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other side shelf and the wheel configuration.
